headline: Genuine Parts Split And AI Push Reshape Risk And Valuation Outlook
summary: Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) is exploring a potential split into two publicly traded companies. The company is evaluating a larger push into artificial intelligence across its operations. The Chief Information & Digital Officer has decided to leave, creating a leadership change during this review. Genuine Parts, the parent company of NAPA and other distribution businesses, operates at the intersection of automotive and industrial replacement parts, areas where supply chain reliability and data...
